MEMBER.NAME: hashOffset
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: offset of hash slot element at index zero

MEMBER.NAME: codeLimit
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: limit to main image signature range

MEMBER.NAME: hashSize
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: size of each hash in bytes

MEMBER.NAME: platform
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: platform identifier; zero if not platform binary

MEMBER.NAME: codeLimit64
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: limit to main image signature range, 64 bits

MEMBER.NAME: weak_bind_off
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: file offset to weak binding info

MEMBER.NAME: lazy_bind_off
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: file offset to lazy binding info

MEMBER.NAME: export_off
MEMBER.REGULAR_CMT: file offset to lazy binding info

MEMORY_SECTION.NAME: EXTERNAL
MEMORY_SECTION.COMMENT: NOTE: This block is artificial and is used to make relocations work correctly
